'''Hirth''' was a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] in the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. His base of operations was located somewhere on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1stm}}
